overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic action game showing a hooded character in a red cloak with white cross emblem exploring a dark wooden Viking longhouse or temple interior. The character walks through corridors and halls decorated with animal skulls and red carpets, eventually encountering and engaging in close combat with hostile NPCs near a bright exit doorway.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a narrow wooden corridor following a companion in fur clothing

red patterned carpet covering the wooden floor
wooden pillar with mounted animal skulls
bright daylight streaming through distant archway

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a character in a red cloak walking down a narrow wooden corridor with dark plank walls and red carpet flooring. A companion in fur clothing walks ahead briefly before moving aside. The corridor is dimly lit with hanging lanterns and features wooden pillars decorated with animal skulls, leading toward a bright archway exit in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: main hall with wooden support pillars and side chambers

events.description: exits narrow corridor into larger main hall with multiple wooden pillars

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking through the main hall, passing seated NPCs and wooden pillars

notable_agents.action: NPC sitting on bench near cooking fire

entered.detail: large wooden support pillars throughout the hall
stone fire pit with smoke rising
tall carved wooden figure against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the narrow corridor into a larger main hall with multiple wooden support pillars. The space features a cooking fire pit, seated NPCs, and a large wooden statue. The character turns right and moves through the hall, passing by side chambers with arched windows. The bright exit archway shifts to the left as the character changes direction.

events.description: engages in close combat with hostile NPC near the exit doorway
approaching bright exit doorway with multiple NPCs reacting

agents.ego_description: approaching hostile NPCs and engaging in hand-to-hand combat before moving toward the exit

notable_agents.action: hostile NPC with sword raising weapon to attack
hostile NPC with arms raised being struck and falling

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the exit area where bright daylight streams through a large doorway. Two hostile NPCs block the path - one with a sword and another with raised arms. The character engages in close combat, striking the second NPC who falls to the ground. Other NPCs in the area react with raised arms as the character continues toward the bright exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dim, oppressive wooden interior that gradually opens into a bright, combat-filled exit. It begins by trailing a character in a red cloak down a narrow corridor of dark planks and red carpets, passing animal skulls and hanging lanterns toward a distant light. As the character moves forward, the space expands into a large main hall featuring a cooking fire pit and a massive wooden statue, with the camera shifting right past arched windows. The scene then pushes toward the source of the light, where the interior gloom gives way to streaming daylight at a large doorway. Finally, the movement culminates in a violent encounter as the character strikes down a hostile guard and pushes through the remaining NPCs toward the bright exterior.
